title: Warm up
content: The slide displays three images representing the cities of Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, each with a unique perspective. They appear to depict different scenarios or characteristics of these cities.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: The slide sets the theme of a journey through China, highlighting its evolution. It includes images of taxis and various iconic buildings representing different regions.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session emphasizes investigating and researching city chains. It focuses on local features, development strategies, and their outcomes and positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide aligns cities with their development strategies. Beijing is paired with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide revisits city development strategies through the perspective of taxi drivers. It reiterates that each city uses local features to develop unique strategies for growth.
